popularStory.headline: Rhodri ap Merfyn (c. 820-878)
popularStory.description: Rhodri ap Merfyn (c. 820-878), later known as Rhodri the Great (Welsh: Rhodri Mawr), succeeded his father, Merfyn Frych, as King of Gwynedd in 844. Rhodri annexed Powys c. 856 and Seisyllwg c. 871. He …

zh.lifeSummary: 當King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons於大約0820年出生在威爾士凱爾納方史爾時，他的父親Merfyn "Frych the Freckled" ap Gwriad26歲，母親Queen Nest ferch Cadell51歲。他於0840年與Angharad ferch Meurig在英國威爾斯尼德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於843年登記服兵役。他去世於0878年在英國威爾斯安格萊享年59歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯安格萊安格萊。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons于大约0820年出生在威尔士凱爾納方史爾时，他的父亲Merfyn "Frych the Freckled" ap Gwriad26岁，母亲Queen Nest ferch Cadell51岁。他于0840年与Angharad ferch Meurig在英国威尔斯尼德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于843年登记服兵役。他去世于0878年在英国威尔斯安格萊享年59岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯安格萊安格萊。

nameMeanings.name: Merfyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Marvin
meanings: English (mainly Leicestershire and Lincolnshire): from the Middle English personal name Merefin, Merevin, Old English Merefin. This is probably formed with Old English mere ‘sea’ + Finn (a personal name derived from the ethnic name). Alternatively, it may be a borrowing of an unrecorded Old Norse name Møra-Finnr.
Slovenian: nickname from marvin, the name of a tart light red wine.

nameMeanings.name: Frych
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Polish: from a pet form of the personal name Krystian (see Christian ).

variants.name: Christian
meanings: German and French: from the personal name Christian, from Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’ (see Christ 1), literally ‘the Christian’. The usual French form is, however, Chrétien (see Chretien ). For the cognate English name see 3 below.
Manx: from Mac Kristinn ‘son of Kristinn’, a borrowing of the Old Norse form of Latin Christianus ‘the Christian’. Christian is a learned, Anglicized form.

English (of Norman origin): from the interchangeable Middle English personal names Cristian and Cristin, used for both men and women. Cristian is from Latin Christianus (see 1 above) and its female equivalent Christiana. Cristin is from Latin Christinus and Christina, male and female diminutives of Christus ‘Christ’. They were introduced to England and Scotland by the Normans in their Old French forms, male Crestien (or the learned form Cristian) and Cristin, female Cristiane and Cristine. Cristin(e) was naturally associated with the Middle English word cristen, cristin, or criston ‘Christian’ (Old English crīsten), reinforcing the tendency to use Cristin and Cristian as alternative name forms. The male name was never common in medieval England, but the female name became increasingly popular in the 14th and 15th centuries.

nameMeanings.name: Rhodri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from rhod ‘wheel’ + rhi ‘ruler’; the name of a 9th-century Welsh king.

variants.name: Rhodrhi
meanings: Traditional: from rhod ‘wheel’ + rhi ‘ruler’; the name of a 9th-century Welsh king.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons was born about 0820, in Caernarfonshire, Wales, his father, Merfyn "Frych the Freckled" ap Gwriad, was 26 and his mother, Queen Nest ferch Cadell, was 51. He married Angharad ferch Meurig in 0840, in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 843. He died in 0878, in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Anglesey, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.Isle of Anglesey, Anglesey, Wales: Anglesey, Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons est né environ 0820, à Caernarfonshire, Galles, son père, Merfyn "Frych the Freckled" ap Gwriad, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Queen Nest ferch Cadell, avait 51 ans. Il a épousé Angharad ferch Meurig en 0840, à Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 843. Il est décédé en 0878, à Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Anglesey, Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons um 0820 in Caernarfonshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Merfyn "Frych the Freckled" ap Gwriad 26 und seine Mutter Queen Nest ferch Cadell 51. Er hat 0840 in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom Angharad ferch Meurig geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 843 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 0878 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Anglesey, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons è nato il circa 0820 nel Caernarfonshire, Galles, il suo padre, Merfyn "Frych the Freckled" ap Gwriad, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Queen Nest ferch Cadell, aveva 51 anni. Lui sposato Angharad ferch Meurig nel 0840, nel Gwynedd, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 843. Morì nel 0878, nel Anglesey, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Anglesey, Anglesey, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britonsが約0820年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Merfyn "Frych the Freckled" ap Gwriadは26歳，母Queen Nest ferch Cadellは51歳であった。0840年にイギリスウェールズグウイネッドでAngharad ferch Meurigと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は843年に兵役登録をした。彼は0878年にイギリスウェールズアングレセイで59歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズアングレセイアングレセイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons(이)가 대략 0820년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Merfyn "Frych the Freckled" ap Gwriad(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Queen Nest ferch Cadell(은)는 51세였다. 그는 0840년 영국 웨일스 그w이네드에서 Angharad ferch Meurig(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 843년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 0878년 영국 웨일스 앤글레시에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 앤글레시 앤글레시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons nasceu aproximadamente 0820, em Caernarfonshire, Gales, seu pai, Merfyn "Frych the Freckled" ap Gwriad, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Queen Nest ferch Cadell, tinha 51 anos. Ele casou-se com Angharad ferch Meurig em 0840, em Gwynedd, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 843. Ele faleceu em 0878, em Anglesey, Gales, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Anglesey, Anglesey, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons родился около 0820 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Merfyn "Frych the Freckled" ap Gwriad было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Queen Nest ferch Cadell, 51. Он женился на женщине по имени Angharad ferch Meurig в 0840 г. в местности гвинедд, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. В 843 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 0878 г. в местности англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности англеси, англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons nació aproximadamente 0820, en Caernarfonshire, Gales, su papá, Merfyn "Frych the Freckled" ap Gwriad, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Queen Nest ferch Cadell, tenía 51 años. Se casó con Angharad ferch Meurig en 0840, en Gwynedd, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 843. Murió en 0878, en Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Anglesey, Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido.
